name: formalizeSpec provider/model coherence — spec_provider:openai + no spec_model → model_used:gpt-4o (NOT claude-opus-4-7). Catches the real-provider 404 gap. (PHASE-22 fix)
description: RED (before fix): specModel=undefined → model_used:undefined → FAIL. GREEN (after fix): specProvider='openai' + no specModel → specModel='gpt-4o' → model_used:'gpt-4o'. Mechanism: _test_force_timeout returns early (no API call, $0.00) after specModel is resolved, exposing model_used as response metadata.
